print\('Table keys:', list\(t.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('name:', t.get\('name'\)\)
print\('headers count:', len\(t.get\('headers',[]\)\)\)
print\('headers:', json.dumps\(t.get\('headers',[]\), ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\)
print\(\)
rows = t.get\('rows', t.get\('data', t.get\('cells', []\)\)\)

for k,v in t.items\(\):
    if isinstance\(v, list\):
        print\(f'  {k}: list of {len\(v\)}'\)
        if v and isinstance\(v[0], dict\):
            print\(f'    first item keys: {list\(v[0].keys\(\)\)[:10]}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  {k}: {type\(v\).__name__} = {str\(v\)[:200]}'\)
